name: Chocolate Cherry Valentine Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the desired temperature (not specified).
2. Cream together sugar and HERSHEY'S Cocoa in a bowl until well combined.
3. Beat in eggs, one at a time, followed by vegetable oil and buttermilk or sour milk. Stir in baking soda and salt until just combined.
4. Pour batter into greased torte pan(s) and bake for the specified time (not provided).
5. Cool completely before assembling.
6. For cream filling: Whisk together sugar, vanilla extract, and whipping cream until smooth.
7. Spread filling between layers or over the center of the cooled torte.
8. Chill thoroughly before serving.
